steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: This is a Form, Structure, and Sense question testing possessives. The blank must show that the "natural beauty and unique cultural traditions" belong to the two towns (Arteaga and Lagos de Moreno). Two towns = plural noun, so a plural possessive is needed.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'town': Singular noun with no possessive marker. Refers to only one town and shows no ownership. ✗
  • Choice B — 'town's': Singular possessive — refers to only one town. Two towns are named in the sentence. ✗
  • Choice C — 'towns': Plural noun but no apostrophe, so it shows no possession. ✗
  • Choice D — 'towns'': Plural possessive formed correctly — the plural noun ending in -s takes an apostrophe after the s. Shows that the beauty and traditions belong to both towns. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
